title: polystichum acrostichoides var. incisum
intro: Polystichum acrostichoides var. incisum, also known as the mountain fern or Christmas fern, is a variety of the Polystichum acrostichoides plant, a type of evergreen fern native to North America. The medicinal properties of Polystichum acrostichoides var. incisum include its ability to act as an astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory agent, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of the plant include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and relieving symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory problems.
